valid_combinations.label: Inspect file
valid_combinations.description: Inspect workbook sheets, columns, types, and structure only.

valid_combinations.label: Review staged data
valid_combinations.description: Profile, map, normalize, and review staged rows without canonical DB changes.

valid_combinations.label: Validate data quality
valid_combinations.description: Profile, map, and normalize with output focused on validation issues.

valid_combinations.label: Preview database changes
valid_combinations.description: Prepare a canonical DB change summary without publishing.

valid_combinations.label: Publish after approval
valid_combinations.description: Publish approved workbook changes to canonical PMO tables.

valid_combinations.label: Report from uploaded data
valid_combinations.description: Profile, map, and normalize uploaded data, then generate a staging preview report without publishing.

valid_combinations.label: Publish and generate report
valid_combinations.description: Publish approved workbook changes, then generate a PMO report.

valid_combinations.label: Generate report from database
valid_combinations.description: Generate a report from existing tenant-scoped canonical PMO data.

valid_combinations.label: Review active staged changes
valid_combinations.description: Re-open a database change summary from an active staged ingestion session.
